description: I Love My CRM is an all-in-one CRM for small businesses that automates follow-ups, appointments, and messaging across SMS, email, phone, and social media.
tagline: Automated CRM with an all-in-one dashboard
overview: I Love My CRM gives small business owners a single dashboard for managing leads, scheduling appointments, and automating follow-ups across SMS, email, phone, and social channels, cutting manual admin time by up to 30% of the workweek. It combines CRM, marketing automation, and appointment scheduling without requiring technical setup.
what_is: I Love My CRM is a straightforward all-in-one platform built for small business owners who need to manage leads, appointments, and multi-channel messaging from a single place. It automates follow-ups across SMS, email, phone, and social media, reducing manual administrative work by up to 30% of the workweek. Users choose it for its ease of use and ability to consolidate multiple tools into one workflow.

The platform is particularly well suited to service-based businesses such as consultants, coaches, and local service providers that depend on consistent follow-up and appointment booking. Time to value is short; teams can start booking appointments and organizing communications within a day. It functions as a combined CRM, marketing automation layer, and appointment scheduler within a go-to-market stack.

I Love My CRM integrates with Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Google Ads, Shopify, and other popular platforms to centralize business workflows. It is designed for simplicity and hands-on support rather than enterprise-scale deployments or complex operational requirements, making it the right fit for small businesses prioritizing speed and ease over deep customization.
